summary: Iteration 118: Comprehensive testing of Export Center feature. Fixed critical bug in Excel export (MergedCell column_letter attribute error). All backend APIs and frontend UI tests passed successfully.

fixed.issue: AttributeError: 'MergedCell' object has no attribute 'column_letter' when generating Excel exports
fixed.fix: Updated auto-width column calculation to handle merged cells properly using get_column_letter utility

context_for_next_testing_agent: Export Center feature fully tested and working. Fixed critical bug in Excel generation where merged cells caused AttributeError. All 8 report types (sales, expenses, supplier_payments, profit_loss, daily_summary, customers, employees, stock) generate correctly in both Excel and PDF formats. Export history is properly logged to MongoDB.

backend_apis.GET_report_types: PASSED - Returns 8 report types with correct structure
backend_apis.POST_generate_sales_excel: PASSED - Generates Excel with correct headers
backend_apis.POST_generate_expenses_pdf: PASSED - Generates PDF with correct content-type
backend_apis.POST_invalid_type_returns_400: PASSED - Returns 400 for invalid report type

frontend_ui.9_period_preset_buttons: PASSED - Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, Last Month, Last 30 Days, This Year, All Time, Custom Range
frontend_ui.custom_range_date_pickers: PASSED - Date pickers appear when Custom Range selected
frontend_ui.export_history_section: PASSED - Shows recent exports with details
frontend_ui.sidebar_navigation: PASSED - Export Center in Reports section

bug_fixed.description: Excel export was failing with AttributeError when iterating over columns due to merged cells
bug_fixed.root_cause: When auto-sizing columns, the code used col_cells[0].column_letter which fails for MergedCell objects
bug_fixed.solution: Added check for column_letter attribute, fallback to get_column_letter(col_idx) utility, and filter out merged cells when calculating max length
